rawContent:
This repository is hosted on GitHub, not Azure DevOps. There are no Azure DevOps MCP tools configured in this environment, and the repository remote points to GitHub.

To query Azure DevOps pull requests, I would need:
1. An Azure DevOps organization URL configured
2. A project name
3. A repository name in Azure DevOps
4. Authentication (PAT token or logged in via `az devops login`)

Please provide:
- Your Azure DevOps organization URL (e.g., `https://dev.azure.com/YourOrg/`)
- The project name
- The repository name (if different from detection)
